title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: members, contributors, leaders pledge make participation community harassment-free experience everyone, regardless age, body size, visible invisible disability, ethnicity, sex characteristics, gender identity expression, level experience, education, socio-economic status, nationality, personal appearance, race, caste, color, religion, sexual identity orientation. pledge act interact ways contribute open, welcoming, diverse, inclusive, healthy community.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Examples behavior contributes positive environment community include: Demonstrating empathy kindness toward people respectful differing opinions, viewpoints, experiences Giving gracefully accepting constructive feedback Accepting responsibility apologizing affected mistakes, learning experience Focusing best just us individuals, overall community Examples unacceptable behavior include: use sexualized language imagery, sexual attention advances kind Trolling, insulting derogatory comments, personal political attacks Public private harassment Publishing others’ private information, physical email address, without explicit permission conduct reasonably considered inappropriate professional setting

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community leaders responsible clarifying enforcing standards acceptable behavior take appropriate fair corrective action response behavior deem inappropriate, threatening, offensive, harmful. Community leaders right responsibility remove, edit, reject comments, commits, code, wiki edits, issues, contributions aligned Code Conduct, communicate reasons moderation decisions appropriate.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct applies within community spaces, also applies individual officially representing community public spaces. Examples representing community include using official e-mail address, posting via official social media account, acting appointed representative online offline event.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Instances abusive, harassing, otherwise unacceptable behavior may reported community leaders responsible enforcement codeofconduct@posit.co. complaints reviewed investigated promptly fairly. community leaders obligated respect privacy security reporter incident.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community leaders follow Community Impact Guidelines determining consequences action deem violation Code Conduct:

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: Use inappropriate language behavior deemed unprofessional unwelcome community. Consequence: private, written warning community leaders, providing clarity around nature violation explanation behavior inappropriate. public apology may requested.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: violation single incident series actions. Consequence: warning consequences continued behavior. interaction people involved, including unsolicited interaction enforcing Code Conduct, specified period time. includes avoiding interactions community spaces well external channels like social media. Violating terms may lead temporary permanent ban.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: serious violation community standards, including sustained inappropriate behavior. Consequence: temporary ban sort interaction public communication community specified period time. public private interaction people involved, including unsolicited interaction enforcing Code Conduct, allowed period. Violating terms may lead permanent ban.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Community Impact: Demonstrating pattern violation community standards, including sustained inappropriate behavior, harassment individual, aggression toward disparagement classes individuals. Consequence: permanent ban sort public interaction within community.

title: Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct
text: Code Conduct adapted Contributor Covenant, version 2.1, available https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct.html. Community Impact Guidelines inspired [Mozilla’s code conduct enforcement ladder][https://github.com/mozilla/inclusion]. answers common questions code conduct, see FAQ https://www.contributor-covenant.org/faq. Translations available https://www.contributor-covenant.org/translations.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: outlines propose change glydraw. detailed discussion contributing tidyverse packages, please see development contributing guide code review principles.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: can fix typos, spelling mistakes, grammatical errors documentation directly using GitHub web interface, long changes made source file. generally means ’ll need edit roxygen2 comments .R, .Rd file. can find .R file generates .Rd reading comment first line.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: want make bigger change, ’s good idea first file issue make sure someone team agrees ’s needed. ’ve found bug, please file issue illustrates bug minimal reprex (also help write unit test, needed). See guide create great issue advice.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: Fork package clone onto computer. haven’t done , recommend using usethis::create_from_github("glycoverse/glydraw", fork = TRUE). Install development dependencies devtools::install_dev_deps(), make sure package passes R CMD check running devtools::check(). R CMD check doesn’t pass cleanly, ’s good idea ask help continuing. Create Git branch pull request (PR). recommend using usethis::pr_init("brief-description--change"). Make changes, commit git, create PR running usethis::pr_push(), following prompts browser. title PR briefly describe change. body PR contain Fixes #issue-number. user-facing changes, add bullet top NEWS.md (.e. just first header). Follow style described https://style.tidyverse.org/news.html.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: New code follow tidyverse style guide. can use styler package apply styles, please don’t restyle code nothing PR. use roxygen2, Markdown syntax, documentation. use testthat unit tests. Contributions test cases included easier accept.

title: Contributing to glydraw
text: Please note glydraw project released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project agree abide terms.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: first argument, structure, glycan draw. can character string notation supported glyparse::auto_parse(), glyrepr::glycan_structure() value.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: draw_cartoon() returns ggplot2 object class glydraw_cartoon. can print directly, pass save_cartoon(), add normal ggplot2 layers needed.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: show_linkage controls whether glycosidic linkage annotations shown. Substituent annotations always shown.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: orient controls overall direction cartoon. Use "H" default horizontal layout "V" vertical layout.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: fuc_orient controls Fuc triangles rotated. default, "flex", points non-reducing Fuc residues toward rendered linkage direction. Use "" every Fuc triangle point upward.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: red_end controls reducing-end annotation. default "" draws standard reducing-end line. Use "~" wavy reducing end, pass string draw string reducing end.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: edge_linewidth controls linkage line width. node_linewidth controls border width residue symbols.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: node_size multiplier default residue-symbol size. default 1. Larger nodes keep cartoon layout draw larger symbols.   large symbols can overlap, values larger 2 rejected. Linkage annotations hidden warning requested node size leaves little annotation space.
code: draw_cartoon(n_core, node_size = 1.2) draw_cartoon(n_core, node_size = 1.6) #> Warning: Linkage annotations are hidden because `node_size` is larger than 1.2. #> ℹ Set `show_linkage = FALSE` to silence this warning, or use a smaller #>   `node_size`.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: colors optional named character vector overriding monosaccharide fill colors. Names must supported monosaccharide names. names provide changed; monosaccharides keep default SNFG colors.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: highlight marks selected residue nodes. available structure glyrepr::glycan_structure() object. Node indices match monosaccharide order printed IUPAC-condensed structure.

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: Use save_cartoon() already one cartoon object. glydraw expose separate width height controls cartoon natural size calculated glycan structure. scale preserves aspect ratio relative symbol sizes.
code: cartoon <- draw_cartoon(n_core, red_end = "~") outfile <- file.path(tempdir(), "n-core.png")  save_cartoon(cartoon, outfile, scale = 2) outfile #> [1] "/tmp/RtmpJNyCtL/n-core.png"

title: Get Started with glydraw
text: Use export_cartoons() draw save vector glycans one call. input can character vector glyrepr::glycan_structure() vector. export_cartoons() creates dirname needed returns list cartoons invisibly. File names come vector names present. Unnamed inputs use sanitized IUPAC-condensed structure text file names, duplicate names made unique.
code: glycans <- c(   core = "Man(a1-3)Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-",   antenna = "Gal(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-",   fucosylated = "Gal(b1-4)[Fuc(a1-3)]GlcNAc(b1-" )  outdir <- file.path(tempdir(), "glydraw-cartoons") suppressMessages(   cartoons <- export_cartoons(     glycans,     outdir,     file_ext = "png",     scale = 1.5,     red_end = "~",     node_size = 1.1   ) )  list.files(outdir) #> [1] "antenna.png"     "core.png"        "fucosylated.png"

title: Draw beautiful SNFG cartoons
text: glydraw ggplot2-native R engine drawing reproducible SNFG glycan cartoons glycan structure objects text notations, support batch export, structural highlighting, deep appearance customization.

title: Draw beautiful SNFG cartoons
text: recommend installing meta-package glycoverse, includes package core glycoverse packages.

title: Draw beautiful SNFG cartoons
text: don’t want install glycoverse packages, can install glydraw. can install latest release glydraw r-universe (recommended): GitHub: install development version (recommended): Note: Tips troubleshooting meta-package glycoverse also applicable : Installation glycoverse.

title: Draw beautiful SNFG cartoons
text: Call draw_cartoon() plot SNFG:  call save_cartoon() save file: can also use export_cartoons() save multiple SNFGs character vectors directory:
code: library(glydraw)  draw_cartoon("Man(a1-3)[Man(a1-6)]Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-") cartoon <- draw_cartoon("Man(a1-3)[Man(a1-6)]Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-") save_cartoon(cartoon, "N-core.png", dpi = 300) glycans <- c(   core = "Man(a1-3)Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-",   antenna = "Gal(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-" ) export_cartoons(glycans, "path/to/save")

what: Draw a Symbol Nomenclature For Glycan (SNFG) — draw_cartoon
title: Draw a Symbol Nomenclature For Glycan (SNFG) — draw_cartoon
text: Draw Symbol Nomenclature Glycan (SNFG)

title: Draw a Symbol Nomenclature For Glycan (SNFG) — draw_cartoon
code: draw_cartoon(   structure,   ...,   show_linkage = TRUE,   orient = c("H", "V"),   fuc_orient = c("flex", "up"),   red_end = "",   edge_linewidth = 0.8,   node_linewidth = 0.8,   node_size = 1,   colors = NULL,   highlight = NULL )

title: Draw a Symbol Nomenclature For Glycan (SNFG) — draw_cartoon
text: structure glyrepr::glycan_structure() scalar, string glycan structure text nomenclatures supported glyparse::auto_parse(). ... Ignored. show_linkage Show glycosidic linkage annotations . Default TRUE. Substituent annotations always shown. orient orientation glycan structure. "H" horizontal, "V" vertical. Default "H" fuc_orient Fuc-like triangle orientation. "flex" points non-reducing Fuc-like residues toward rendered linkage direction, "" draws Fuc-like triangles pointing upward. Reducing-end Fuc-like residues always point upward. Defaults "flex". red_end Reducing-end annotation. default "" keeps current reducing-end line. Use "~" add wavy reducing end, string draw string reducing end. edge_linewidth Numeric scalar controlling linewidth linkage lines. Defaults current value, 0.8. node_linewidth Numeric scalar controlling linewidth node borders. Defaults current value, 0.8. node_size Numeric scalar used multiplier default node size. Defaults 1, keeps current size. Linkage annotations moved farther larger nodes, hidden warning node_size large leave enough annotation space. Values larger 2 rejected residues overlap. colors Optional named character vector custom monosaccharide fill colors. Names must supported monosaccharide names, "Gal" "GlcNAc". User-provided colors overwrite default SNFG colors, unprovided monosaccharides keep default colors. Defaults NULL. highlight integer vector specifying node indices highlight. argument applicable structure glyrepr::glycan_structure(). Note glyrepr::glycan_structure(), node indices correspond exactly monosaccharides printed IUPAC nomenclature. example, given glyrepr::as_glycan_structure("Gal(b1-3)[GlcNAc(b1-6)]GalNAc(a1-"), setting highlight = c(1, 3) highlight "Gal" "GalNAc" nodes.

title: Draw a Symbol Nomenclature For Glycan (SNFG) — draw_cartoon

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
code: export_cartoons(   x,   dirname,   ...,   file_ext = "png",   dpi = 300,   scale = 1,   show_linkage = TRUE,   orient = c("H", "V"),   fuc_orient = c("flex", "up"),   red_end = "",   edge_linewidth = 0.8,   node_linewidth = 0.8,   node_size = 1,   colors = NULL )

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
text: x glyrepr::glycan_structure() vector, character vector glycan structure text nomenclatures supported glyparse::auto_parse(). dirname Directory name save cartoons. exist, created. ... Ignored. file_ext File extension supported ggplot2::ggsave(). Defaults "png". dpi Deprecated ignored. Use scale change output size. scale Numeric output-size multiplier passed save_cartoon(). show_linkage Show glycosidic linkage annotations . Default TRUE. Substituent annotations always shown. orient orientation glycan structure. "H" horizontal, "V" vertical. Default "H" fuc_orient Fuc-like triangle orientation. "flex" points non-reducing Fuc-like residues toward rendered linkage direction, "" draws Fuc-like triangles pointing upward. Reducing-end Fuc-like residues always point upward. Defaults "flex". red_end Reducing-end annotation. default "" keeps current reducing-end line. Use "~" add wavy reducing end, string draw string reducing end. edge_linewidth Numeric scalar controlling linewidth linkage lines. Defaults current value, 0.8. node_linewidth Numeric scalar controlling linewidth node borders. Defaults current value, 0.8. node_size Numeric scalar used multiplier default node size. Defaults 1, keeps current size. Linkage annotations moved farther larger nodes, hidden warning node_size large leave enough annotation space. Values larger 2 rejected residues overlap. colors Optional named character vector custom monosaccharide fill colors. Names must supported monosaccharide names, "Gal" "GlcNAc". User-provided colors overwrite default SNFG colors, unprovided monosaccharides keep default colors. Defaults NULL.

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
text: function returns list cartoons implicitly.

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
text: IUPAC-condensed nomenclatures used file names. x named character vector named glyrepr::glycan_structure() vector, vector names used file names.

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
text: familiar ggplot2::ggsave() interface uses width, height, dpi ordinary ggplot2 plots drawn user-chosen device size. glydraw cartoons different: natural width height calculated glycan structure residues, linkages, labels, borders stay comparable across different glycans. users supplied arbitrary width height, glydraw either distort structure-derived layout need guess reconcile one requested size . dpi also right control changing alters point- inch-based ggplot2 elements rasterized relative fixed cartoon canvas. glydraw therefore keeps internal fixed design scale uses scale single multiplier final pixel dimensions. preserves cartoon's aspect ratio relative appearance still allowing larger smaller output files.

title: Export all glycan structures to figures — export_cartoons
code: export_cartoons(   c(     "Man(a1-3)Man(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-",     "Gal(b1-4)GlcNAc(b1-"   ),   "path/to/save" ) #> ℹ Exporting 2 glycan cartoons.

title: Save fixed-size glycan cartoon image to local device. — save_cartoon
Save fixed-size glycan cartoon image to local device. — save_cartoon
text: cartoon ggplot2 object returned draw_cartoon(). file File name glycan cartoon. ... Ignored. dpi Deprecated ignored. Use scale change output size. scale Numeric output-size multiplier. default 1 saves cartoon natural fixed size; 2 saves cartoon twice pixel width height.

title: Save fixed-size glycan cartoon image to local device. — save_cartoon
text: familiar ggplot2::ggsave() interface uses width, height, dpi ordinary ggplot2 plots drawn user-chosen device size. glydraw cartoons different: natural width height calculated glycan structure residues, linkages, labels, borders stay comparable across different glycans. users supplied arbitrary width height, glydraw either distort structure-derived layout need guess reconcile one requested size . dpi also right control changing alters point- inch-based ggplot2 elements rasterized relative fixed cartoon canvas. glydraw therefore keeps internal fixed design scale uses scale single multiplier final pixel dimensions. preserves cartoon's aspect ratio relative appearance still allowing larger smaller output files.

title: Save fixed-size glycan cartoon image to local device. — save_cartoon
glydraw (development version)
text: export_cartoons() longer supports glyexp::experiment() input, glyexp longer package dependency. (#33) Specifying optianl arguments positional manner longer supported. Please use arg = value instead. (#40)

title: glydraw (development version)
text: Add colors parameter draw_cartoon() export_cartoons() customizing monosaccharide fill colors. (#44) Add fuc_orient parameter draw_cartoon() export_cartoons() choosing whether Fuc triangles always point upward flex toward linkage direction. (#42) Add scale parameter save_cartoon() export_cartoons() changing output pixel dimensions preserving cartoon appearance. (#35) Add node_size parameter draw_cartoon() export_cartoons() scaling residue cartoon sizes. Values larger 2 rejected residues overlap. (#36) Add edge_linewidth node_linewidth parameters draw_cartoon() export_cartoons() customizing linkage line node border widths. (#34) Add red_end parameter draw_cartoon() export_cartoons() custom reducing-end text wavy reducing-end annotation. (#31)

title: glydraw (development version)
text: Extend Fuc-style branch layout flexible orientation additional Fuc-like residues. (#46) Fix draw_cartoon() structures two core Fuc branches one b1-4 GlcNAc branch, avoiding igraph vertex-selection error keeping b1-4 GlcNAc aligned core GlcNAc. (#45) Deprecate dpi save_cartoon() export_cartoons() glydraw uses internal fixed design scale. Supplying dpi now warns argument ignored. (#35) Keep substituent annotations visible show_linkage = FALSE. (#41) Fix diagonal HexNAc linkage annotation offsets orient = "V". (#43) Adjust linkage annotation offsets diagonal HexNAc links. (#29)

title: glydraw 0.5.1
text: Use SNFG standard colors. (8573759) Minor aesthetic adjustments line width node size. (427e8d0, 4466f88)

title: glydraw 0.5.0
text: Use native ggplot2 theme manage cartoon size, ggview longer dependent. (#27)

title: glydraw 0.5.0
text: Fix overlapping linkage annotations glycans. (#21) Fix overlapping a1-3 a1-6 core Fucose residues. (#23) Orient reducing end annotation line vertically orient = "V". (#24) Redesign node coordination layout algorithm fix inaccurate branch spacing glycans. (#26, #28)

title: glydraw 0.4.1
text: Fix substituent annotations glycan cartoons. (#16) Fix reducing-end Fuc orientation O-Fuc glycans. (#15) Make export_cartoons() create output directory needed. (#17) Make export_cartoons() use vector names output filenames available. (#17)

title: glydraw 0.4.0
text: Remove mono_size parameter draw_cartoon(). (9b05e6c)

title: glydraw 0.4.0
text: Add highlight parameter draw_cartoon(). (7e57a54, 3745ec8, c1057ba) Add export_cartoons() save multiple glycan structure cartoons files. (e1ac3c3)

title: glydraw 0.4.0
text: Fix bug reducing end annotation shown unknown anomer information. (#12) Fix bug glycans one monosaccharide plotted. (#11) Fix bug “?” linkages correctly handled. (#9) Fix incorrect reducing end annotation direction situations. (#8) Fix bug glycan structures multiple branches incorrect layouts. (2ac4e9f) Fix bug “png” supported save_cartoon(). (fed89b9) Fix bug structures generic “NeuAc” “NeuGc” plotted. (3b78303)

title: glydraw 0.3.1
text: Update dependency glyrepr 0.10.0. Fix various bugs including illegal character processing, fucose arrangement, display sizing issues.

title: glydraw 0.3.0
text: Remove border_px path parameters save_cartoon().

title: glydraw 0.3.0
text: Now use ggview instead ggimage size fixing, relies rstudioapi::viewer() display plot. might feel difference display effect, SNFG keeps .

title: glydraw 0.2.0
text: Signature draw_cartoon() changed draw_cartoon(structure, mono_size = 0.2, show_linkage = TRUE, orient = "H", ...) better semantics.

title: glydraw 0.2.0
text: draw_cartoon() now prints fixed-size cartoon (sizes calculated based glycan structures) plot panel, provide unified behavior save_cartoon(). Add reducing end annotation cartoons (including short segment anomer reducing end residue).

title: glydraw 0.2.0
text: Make residue size larger. Adjust linkage annotation positions. Add border plot panel. Fix issue linkage annotations truncated. Fix bug glycans one residue plotted draw_cartoon(). Fix bug path parameter mandatory save_cartoon(). Now optional, line ggplot2::ggsave(). Update documentation save_cartoon() differentiate ggplot2::ggsave().

title: glydraw 0.1.0
